entities.title: Entities
entities.description: Select the existing pool hardware entities from Home Assistant.

data_description.pump_switch_entity: Main ON/OFF control for the pool circulation pump.
data_description.pump_mode_select_entity: Mode selector on your pool controller (Manual / Auto / Heat).
data_description.pump_speed_select_entity: Speed selector used to set low / medium / high pump speed.
data_description.pump_running_sensor_entity: Use this if your hardware exposes an actual running status. Improves runtime tracking accuracy.
data_description.outdoor_temp_sensor_entity: Outside temperature used for freeze and winter protection decisions.
data_description.pool_temp_sensor_entity: Pool water temperature sensor used for logic and visibility.
data_description.slot1_start_entity: Entity that sets start time of filter slot 1.
data_description.slot1_end_entity: Entity that sets end time of filter slot 1.
data_description.slot2_start_entity: Entity that sets start time of filter slot 2.
data_description.slot2_end_entity: Entity that sets end time of filter slot 2.
data_description.slot3_start_entity: Entity that sets start time of filter slot 3.
data_description.slot3_end_entity: Entity that sets end time of filter slot 3.
data_description.slot1_speed_select_entity: Select entity controlling speed for slot 1.
data_description.slot2_speed_select_entity: Select entity controlling speed for slot 2.
data_description.slot3_speed_select_entity: Select entity controlling speed for slot 3.

settings.title: Winter settings
settings.description: Configure winter runtime and temperature thresholds.

data.test_mode: TEST MODE (dry-run, do not write hardware)

data_description.winter_min_runtime_minutes: Minimum total pump runtime to achieve each winter day.
data_description.freeze_temp_c: If outdoor temperature falls below this value, run pump continuously on low speed.
data_description.extreme_freeze_temp_c: If outdoor temperature falls below this value, run pump continuously on medium speed.
data_description.update_interval_minutes: How often the integration evaluates logic and applies changes.
data_description.slot1_speed_level: Speed level to apply for slot 1 when slot speed entities are configured.
data_description.slot2_speed_level: Speed level to apply for slot 2 when slot speed entities are configured.
data_description.slot3_speed_level: Speed level to apply for slot 3 when slot speed entities are configured.
data_description.test_mode: When enabled, changes are only logged and not written to pool hardware entities.
data_description.notify_service: Optional HA notify service (for example notify.mobile_app_phone).

modes.title: Hardware option values
modes.description: Set exact option texts used by your pool hardware selects.

data_description.pump_mode_heat_value: Exact option text used by your hardware for heat mode.
data_description.pump_mode_auto_value: Exact option text used by your hardware for auto mode.
data_description.pump_mode_manual_value: Exact option text used by your hardware for manual mode.
data_description.pump_speed_low_value: Exact option text for low speed.
data_description.pump_speed_medium_value: Exact option text for medium speed.
data_description.pump_speed_high_value: Exact option text for high speed.

recalculate_now.name: Recalculate now
recalculate_now.description: Force next tick to rebuild slot schedule.
